title: Fossils and archeology parallax
description: A small texture pack that changes the defaut fossils and archeology parallax.
body:
This resource pack transforms the base texture of [fossils and archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/fossils-and-archeology-revival) parallax to a weathered look that resembles a Minecraft dungeon or stronghold with some minor adjustments.
 

Requires [fossils and archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/fossils-and-archeology-revival) to function.
![parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6afbcd89949e370ba61521314719479fb9447855.png)
